message:
feat(web): add error recovery and WebGL detection to Model3DView

Add comprehensive error handling and loading states to the 3D structure viewer:

- Add WebGL detection with graceful fallback when not supported
  - Shows informative message suggesting modern browser
  - Uses proper ARIA attributes for accessibility

- Add skeleton loading state using Model3DSkeleton component
  - Replaces basic spinner with better perceived performance
  - Shows progress percentage during structure loading

- Add improved error states with retry functionality
  - Human-readable error messages for common failures:
    - 404/not found errors
    - Network/fetch failures
    - Timeout errors
    - CORS issues
    - Parse/corruption errors
  - Retry button to attempt refetch without page reload

- Add empty state for phages without structures
  - Informative message explaining not all phages have structures
  - Distinct from error state (no retry needed)

- Improve ARIA attributes for all overlay states
  - role="alert" for errors, role="status" for empty state
  - aria-live="polite" for dynamic content updates

Implements: phage_explorer-pey4
